rationale: result_rev ca1240ae adds TestAttachmentMissingSidecarFallback covering AC5's missing-sidecar fallback case (direct read, Events(), and LoadEventsInline). Underlying helper API, EventsAttachmentExtraKey, and round-trip preservation already exist in cli/internal/bead/attachments.go satisfying AC1-4.

findings.summary: Reviewed diff is execution evidence only; actual change is the test added in commit ca1240ae referenced as result_rev.
Test asserts that LoadEventsInline clears the attachment ref when the sidecar is missing — matches behavior at attachments.go:222.
